testcase.name: test_status_returns_404_for_invalid_session

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for invalid session, got 500 assert 500 == 404 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_billing.py:206: in test_status_returns_404_for_invalid_session assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404 for invalid session, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404 for invalid session, got 500 E assert 500 == 404 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_crawl_deducts_credit
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_billing.py:306: in test_crawl_deducts_credit assert crawl_response.status_code == 200, f"Crawl failed: {crawl_response.status_code}: {crawl_response.text}" E AssertionError: Crawl failed: 400: {"detail":"Failed to crawl URL: [SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: unable to get local issuer certificate (_ssl.c:1016)"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_402_when_no_credits

skipped.message: Requires dedicated test user with 0 credits - manual verification needed

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_billing.py:324: Requires dedicated test user with 0 credits - manual verification needed
